mapper.select:
SELECT cr.id AS id, cr.dog_id AS dogId, d.name AS dogName, d.profile_image_url AS dogProfileImageUrl, cr.record_type_code AS recordType, cr.record_date AS recordDate, cr.title AS title, cr.note AS note, md.clinic_name AS clinicName, md.symptoms AS symptoms, md.diagnosis AS diagnosis, md.treatment AS treatment, md.medication_start_date AS medicationStartDate, md.medication_days AS medicationDays,
-- 투약 상태 변환 CASE WHEN md.care_record_id IS NULL THEN 'NONE' WHEN md.is_medication_completed = true THEN 'COMPLETED' ELSE 'ACTIVE' END AS medicationStatus,
ed.category_code AS categoryCode, COALESCE(md.amount, ed.amount, 0) AS amount,
-- 연관 병원 기록 Self-Join 정보 rmr.id AS relatedMedicalId, rmr.title AS relatedMedicalTitle, rmr.record_date AS relatedMedicalDate, rmd.clinic_name AS relatedMedicalClinicName
FROM public.care_records cr INNER JOIN public.dogs d ON d.id = cr.dog_id LEFT JOIN public.care_record_medical_details md ON md.care_record_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN public.care_record_expense_details ed ON ed.care_record_id = cr.id -- Self-Join for related medical record LEFT JOIN public.care_records rmr ON ed.related_medical_record_id = rmr.id LEFT JOIN public.care_record_medical_details rmd ON rmr.id = rmd.care_record_id WHERE cr.id = #{id} AND cr.user_id = #{userId}
